text: I feel a sense of anticipation, as though I am on the threshold between spaces defined by potential: an open, almost empty room ready to hold ideas, and a vivid exhibition of human creativity and inquiry. The first scene feels sterile and waiting, almost like a pause in time, while the second immerses me in a celebration of curiosity and innovation. Here, I am reminded of how environments shape our thoughts—a blank slate or a tapestry of discovery, each inviting me to reflect on my own readiness to create or to learn.
